# Łukasz Miądowicz — AI Product Leader & AI Strategy Lead

> I help companies grow revenue, cut costs, and move faster — I build AI products — and I use AI to build them faster. I find the niche, build the system, and ship the product.

## Who I Am

Łukasz Miądowicz is an AI Product Leader, AI Strategy & Adoption Lead, and hands-on Builder based in Warsaw, Poland (available remote worldwide). I started as a Software Engineer — including at Google for Startups — moved into product, and never stopped coding. I find differentiators others miss, identify the niche, build the business case, and ship.

**Documented results:**
- $80M ARR scaled (B2B SaaS)
- 98% task time reduction (Qtravel.ai — proposal creation from 4 hours to 5 minutes)
- $191 net savings per task · 1.3-year payback period (Qtravel.ai)
- 3× capacity increase (Qtravel.ai, same headcount)
- +80% conversion increase (Qtravel.ai — AI personalisation layer)
- +40% conversion increase (ButterCMS AI Alpha, shipped in under 3 months)
- PhD Quantum Physics (doctoral-level research)
- Haas School of Business alumnus (UC Berkeley)

## What I Do

- **AI Product Leader** — End-to-end AI product leadership: vision, roadmap, team, stakeholder alignment. Hands-on enough to prototype the hardest hypotheses myself.
- **Niche & Differentiator Discovery** — First-principles user research, JTBD, and rapid hypothesis testing. I find the niche others miss.
- **Revenue & Cost Impact via AI** — I build the economic case for AI investments and then deliver it. $191 net savings per task, 1.3-year payback documented.
- **AI Adoption & Strategy** — Move from AI experiments to AI operating models. Frameworks, workshops, and hands-on coaching.
- **Rapid Prototyping (I Build It)** — From hypothesis to functional prototype in 24–48 hours using Claude Code, Python, and LLM APIs.
- **Forward-Deployed Solutions** — Embed with customers to deploy and customize AI systems in their environment.
- **AI System Architecture** — End-to-end design of multi-agent AI systems with HITL, MCP, and observability.
- **Agentic UX Design** — In-product experiences where AI agents operate inside existing workflows, not as chatbot overlays.
- **Enterprise AI Readiness** — SSO, RBAC, audit logs, multi-tenancy, LLMOps, evals.
